race.comment: BELLA MONTAGNA (5) dynamic mare who should have finished closer in the G3 Belle Of The Turf here last December. Excellent return with the 57.5kg when a slashing second over 1600m at Randwick. Back in great order and can finish over the top of these. THRICE (3) Wootton Bassett import who was heavily supported at his Australian debut with a fading fifth over 1800m at Randwick in BM94 class. Undefeated in two second-up starts and will relish the extra ground with the claim. Sure to be thereabouts. KING OF THE SEA (10) UK import who made his Australian debut with a slashing fourth from a wide gate over 1600m at Caulfield four weeks ago. Kept up to the mark with a recent Canterbury trial placing over 1100m. Ugly map again and take on trust. MONOPOLISTIC (18) improving gelding who warmed up late when sixth over 2000m at Randwick in the G3 Packer Plate. Can circle the field and test these with the 53kg. Respect. KING PEDRO (11) good return and undefeated at this track and trip.
